title: Drunken Master II
desc: Wong Fei-hung finds himself in the middle of a smuggling conspiracy, using his mastery of Drunken Boxing to take on dangerous foes and protect his homeland.

title: Never Back Down: No Surrender
desc: Former martial arts title holder prepares to return to familiar fields and uses his traditional fighting skills against the new line of fighters in order to reclaim his position.

title: Green Lantern
desc: Reckless test pilot Hal Jordan is chosen by a mystical ring, gaining supernatural powers. He joins the intergalactic police to face the evil Parallax threatening Earth.

title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
desc: Peter Murdoch, a wealthy man, funds a project wherein two anacondas are tested in a research laboratory. Later, a mercenary is hired to stop the snakes after they escape and go on a killing spree.

title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
desc: Alice wakes up to find that Raccoon city is infested with zombies and monsters. Later, she tries her best to find a way out of the city before it is too late.

title: Charlie's Angels
desc: Charlie, a wealthy mystery figure, tasks three capable and captivating women with the job of finding Eric Knox, a genius in software development and the leader of Knox Enterprises.

title: Malignant
desc: Madison, a young woman, is terrified by visions of the murders of strangers. Later, she decides to find and save the victims.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls demonstrates all the techniques and skills that are required in order to stay alive in the dangerous waters of the Everglades.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls travels across Kenya to demonstrate how to survive the African savannah.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls survives the Pacific Ocean, encountering coral reefs, rip currents, and relentless surf and comes face to face with sharks.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls shows how to survive the big island of Hawaii, home to Kilauea, the world's most active volcano and one of the toughest places on Earth.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear travels to America's greatest mountain range-the Sierra Nevada. He uses his knowledge of American Indian survival techniques to build shelters, calm wild horses, and find food.

title: Toddlers & Tiaras
desc: Diamonds are a girls' best friend at the StoryBook Pageant in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania and the contestants are bringing the sparkle and shine in hopes of the Ultimate Grand Supreme title.

title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?
desc: The filmmaker portrays the stories of married men and women who have unknowingly tied the knot with criminals, including swindlers and bank robbers.

title: Who Am I
desc: Following the demise of his beloved professor, Bhavataviya, a philosophy student, sets out on a quest to find the answer to the existential question of life.

title: The Equalizer 2
desc: Robert McCall's close friend, Susan Plummer, is killed while investigating a murder-suicide. As a former marine and spy, he leverages his skills and resources to find the culprit and avenge her death.

title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
desc: Sonny and Sam find an ancient manuscript in an abandoned house while cleaning it. However, things escalate when the text brings a ventriloquist dummy named Slappy to life.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls shows how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels and avoid frostbite in order to survive Iceland's extreme conditions.
